name: Beacon Financial
description_short: Beacon Financial Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution serving healthcare employees and their families with competitive lending and deposit products.
description_long:
Beacon Financial Credit Union, formerly known as Mountain States Credit Union, was established to provide quality financial services and improve the financial health of its members. The institution is structured as a member-owned, not-for-profit cooperative that prioritizes community development and serving those within its defined field of membership. This credit union model emphasizes returning profits to members rather than external shareholders, creating a community-focused approach to banking.

Beacon Financial offers a comprehensive range of financial products including auto loans (new and used vehicles at competitive rates starting as low as 5.75% APR for new cars and 6.90% for used), deposit accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs) with rates up to 5.00% APY, online and mobile banking platforms, bill payment services, Zelle money transfer capability, and loan applications. Members can access these services through multiple channels including physical branch locations, ATM networks, online banking portals, and a dedicated mobile app. The institution emphasizes digital accessibility, particularly promoting online options during operational challenges.

Beacon Financial distinguishes itself through its open membership structure that extends eligibility to immediate family members of qualifying employees—including spouses, siblings, children, parents, grandparents, aunts, uncles, cousins, and step relations. Membership eligibility extends beyond healthcare sector employees (Ballad Health and subsidiaries) to include employees and families of Champion Chevrolet, Crowder RV, One Stop Wine and Liquor, Right Coast Medical LLC, and Wise Property Solutions. The low $25 minimum balance requirement makes membership accessible and removes barriers to entry. The institution also demonstrates commitment to member security through USA PATRIOT Act compliance and identity protection protocols.

Beacon Financial operates as a traditional credit union with standard banking services rather than specializing in niche lending or alternative products. While competitive on auto loan rates and CD yields, the institution's reach is geographically and professionally limited to specific membership categories. The website provides limited transparency on membership restrictions for some categories and does not detail all fee structures or full product ranges. For consumers outside the defined field of membership, this institution is inaccessible despite potentially competitive rates. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
pros: Low auto loan rates: new cars from 5.75% APR, used cars from 6.90% APR
Competitive CD yields up to 5.00% APY on certificate accounts
Extended family membership eligibility includes 9+ categories of relatives
Low $25 minimum balance requirement for regular share savings accounts
Full-service digital banking including mobile app, online banking, bill pay, and Zelle transfers
Member-owned not-for-profit structure returns profits to members rather than shareholders
Multiple access channels: physical branches, ATM network, online portal, and mobile app
cons: Limited field of membership—restricted to specific employers and their families, making it inaccessible to general consumers
No information provided on checking account features, minimum balances, or maintenance fees
Limited transparency on full product range and fee schedules on publicly available website
No mention of personal loans, credit cards, mortgages, or other common banking products
Geographic limitations not clearly specified—branch and ATM availability unclear for potential members
best_for: Current and former Ballad Health healthcare employees seeking competitive auto financing
Employees of Champion Chevrolet, Crowder RV, One Stop Wine and Liquor, Right Coast Medical, or Wise Property Solutions
Family members of eligible employees looking for accessible credit union membership with low barriers to entry
diagnosis: Beacon Financial is best for employees and family members of specific healthcare and business organizations who need competitive auto financing or savings products within a member-owned credit union structure. The main caveat is that membership is restricted to defined employee groups and their relatives; this institution is not accessible to the general public, significantly limiting its utility for most consumers seeking banking services.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
